units.source_text: 些實體對集團列賬基準除稅前利潤及固定匯率除稅前利潤分別產⽣累計影響13億美元及11億美元。
units.translation_target_text: These entities had a cumulative impact of US$1.3 billion and US$1.1 billion on the group's accounting basis pre-tax profit and constant exchange rate pre-tax profit respectively.

units.source_text: 1 包括出售法國零售銀⾏業務的影響。
units.translation_target_text: 1Includes the impact of the sale of the French retail banking business.

layout_variants.display_en: 1Includes the impact of the sale of the French retail banking business.

units.source_text: 2 包括就收購英國矽⾕銀⾏確認的16億美元增益。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Includes US$1.6 billion of gain recognized on acquisition of UK-based Silicon Valley Bank.
units.translation_en: 2 Includes US$1.6 billion of gain recognized on acquisition of UK-based Silicon Valley Bank.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 3 包括出售加拿⼤銀⾏業務所得款項的外匯對沖公允值變動。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Includes changes in fair value of foreign exchange hedges with proceeds from the sale of Canadian banking operations.

layout_variants.display_en: 4 Changes in fair value of HSBC Holdings' ineligible hedges.

units.source_text: 5 款額與2022年確認的重組架構準備撥回有關。
units.translation_target_text: 5 The amount is related to the reversal of the restructuring structure provisions confirmed in 2022.

layout_variants.display_en: 5 The amount is related to the reversal of the restructuring structure provisions confirmed in 2022.

units.source_text: 6 包括就集團於交通銀⾏的投資確認的減值虧損30億美元。
units.translation_target_text: 6 Including an impairment loss of US$3 billion recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications.
